# The Flywheel Planning Playbook

> Complete guide to building software with AI agent swarms. 12 principles, 10 phases, 47 prompts. Based on Jeffrey Emanuel's agentic coding methodology.

## Playbook

- [12 Principles](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/playbook/principles/): The ideas behind the workflow
- [Phase 0 — Prerequisites](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/playbook/phase-0-prerequisites/): AGENTS.md, beads, tooling
- [Phase 1 — Draft](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/playbook/phase-1-draft/): First comprehensive plan
- [Phase 2 — Refine](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/playbook/phase-2-refine/): Iterate until wording-only changes
- [Phase 3 — Alien Artifacts](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/playbook/phase-3-alien-artifacts/): Inject mathematically optimal constructs
- [Phase 4 — Beads](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/playbook/phase-4-beads/): Convert plan to execution graph
- [Phase 5 — QA](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/playbook/phase-5-qa/): Review task graph until flatline
- [Phase 6 — Swarm](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/playbook/phase-6-swarm/): Deploy agents, execute all tasks
- [Phase 7 — Review](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/playbook/phase-7-review/): Numbered sessions until diffs flatline
- [Phase 8 — Performance](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/playbook/phase-8-performance/): Profile-driven optimization
- [Phase 9 — Metacognition](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/playbook/phase-9-metacognition/): Study spec evolution

## Prompts

- [Prompt Index](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/prompts/overview/): 47 prompts organized by category (PL, BD, EX, RV, QA, MT)
- [Full Prompt Pack](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/prompts/prompt-pack/): All 47 prompts verbatim, copy-paste ready

## Reference

- [Dispatch Table](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/reference/dispatch/): When in situation X, use prompt Y
- [Doctrine](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/reference/doctrine/): 15 non-negotiable rules
- [Anti-Patterns](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/reference/anti-patterns/): 10 ways to destroy your project
- [Toolchain](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/reference/toolchain/): 23 tools that make the flywheel turn

## Agent Injection

- [Prompt Injector](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/agent/): 47 prompts + dispatch table + chaining rules + routing heuristic. Lightweight, no state machine.
- [Methodology Kernel](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/agent/kernel/): Full operating system: compressed kernel, DSL with state machine, REPL protocol, 3 advanced combos, 47 prompts.
- [Methodology Kernel (llms-full.txt)](https://starensen.github.io/flywheel-playbook/llms-full.txt): Same as Methodology Kernel but plain text (~45KB vs ~200KB HTML). Preferred for agent context injection.
